name: Hauschild Installationen
message: For more than five decades, Hauschild has been considered the epitome of professional building technology and first-class bathroom architecture far beyond Kitzbühel's district borders. Whether gas, water and heating systems, alternative energies, indoor and outdoor pools or modern complete bathrooms from a single source - you can count on our competence and our unique know–how. As many happy Hauschild customers already do. Are you looking for a reliable installer in Kitzbühel or Pinzgau for all your plumbing and heating needs? We are your competent partner when it comes to professional installations, repairs and maintenance.https://www.hauschild.com/
